languages.text: Гемункул не пощадил даже своего сородичка — обезглавленный друкари стоит, вытянувшись по струнке, будто несет службу.
The Haemonculus showed no mercy even to his own kind. The decapitated Drukhari stands rigidly to attention, as if on duty.
languages.original_text: Гемункул не пощадил даже своего сородичка — обезглавленный друкари стоит, вытянувшись по струнке, будто несет службу.

traits.locale_text: The Haemonculus showed no mercy even to its own kind. The decapitated Drukhari stands at rigid attention, as if standing guard.
The Haemonculus showed no mercy even to its own kind. The decapitated Drukhari stands at rigid attention, as if standing guard.
The Haemonculus showed no mercy even to his own kind. The decapitated Drukhari stands rigidly to attention, as if on duty.

The Haemonculus showed no mercy even to his own kind. The decapitated Drukhari stands rigidly to attention, as if on duty.
The Haemonculus showed no mercy even to his own kind. The decapitated Drukhari stands rigidly to attention, as if on duty.

languages.text: El Hemónculo no ha tenido compasión ni con sus congéneres. El Drukhari decapitado permanece firme, como si estuviera montando guardia.
languages.original_text: The Haemonculus showed no mercy even to his own kind. The decapitated Drukhari stands rigidly to attention, as if on duty.

traits.locale_text: El Hemónculo no ha tenido compasión ni con sus congéneres. El Drukhari decapitado permanece firme, como si estuviera montando guardia.

languages.text: L'hémoncule n'a fait montre d'aucune pitié, même envers les siens. Le Drukhari décapité se tient au garde-à-vous, comme s'il était en service.
languages.original_text: The Haemonculus showed no mercy even to his own kind. The decapitated Drukhari stands rigidly to attention, as if on duty.

traits.locale_text: L'hémoncule n'a fait montre d'aucune pitié, même envers les siens. Le Drukhari décapité se tient au garde-à-vous, comme s'il était en service.

languages.text: 血伶人对同族同样毫不留情。无头的黑暗灵族僵直立正，仿佛正在执勤。
languages.original_text: The Haemonculus showed no mercy even to his own kind. The decapitated Drukhari stands rigidly to attention, as if on duty.

traits.locale_text: 血伶人对同族同样毫不留情。无头的黑暗灵族僵直立正，仿佛正在执勤。

languages.text: Der Haemonculus kannte nicht einmal gegenüber Seinesgleichen Gnade. Der enthauptete Drukhari steht stramm, als wäre er im Dienst.
languages.original_text: The Haemonculus showed no mercy even to his own kind. The decapitated Drukhari stands rigidly to attention, as if on duty.

traits.locale_text: Der Haemonculus kannte nicht einmal gegenüber Seinesgleichen Gnade. Der enthauptete Drukhari steht stramm, als wäre er im Dienst.

languages.text: Haimonkulus, kendi türüne bile merhamet göstermemiş. Başı kesik Drukhari, sanki vazife başındaymış gibi kaskatı bir şekilde hazırda bekliyor.
languages.original_text: The Haemonculus showed no mercy even to his own kind. The decapitated Drukhari stands rigidly to attention, as if on duty.

traits.locale_text: Haimonkulus, kendi türüne bile merhamet göstermemiş. Başı kesik Drukhari, sanki vazife başındaymış gibi kaskatı bir şekilde hazırda bekliyor.

languages.text: ハエモンクルスは、自らの同族にすら慈悲を見せなかった。首を切断されたドルカリが、まるで任務中であるかのように、こわばった直立不動の姿勢をとっている。
languages.original_text: The Haemonculus showed no mercy even to his own kind. The decapitated Drukhari stands rigidly to attention, as if on duty.

traits.locale_text: ハエモンクルスは、自らの同族にすら慈悲を見せなかった。首を切断されたドルカリが、まるで任務中であるかのように、こわばった直立不動の姿勢をとっている。
